top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Examination e
JOIN Laboratory l ON e.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.APTT > (SELECT AVG(APTT) FROM Laboratory) 
  AND e.Thrombosis = 'No';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM Examination e
JOIN Laboratory l ON e.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.APTT > (
    SELECT APTT 
    FROM Laboratory 
    WHERE APTT IS NOT NULL 
    ORDER BY APTT DESC 
    LIMIT 1
) * 1.5  -- Assuming abnormal APTT is > 1.5x the normal upper limit, using max APTT as proxy for normal upper limit
  AND e.Thrombosis = 'No';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Examination e
JOIN Laboratory l ON e.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.APTT > (SELECT AVG(APTT) FROM Laboratory) 
  AND e.Thrombosis = 'No';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM Examination e
JOIN Laboratory l ON e.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.APTT > (
    SELECT APTT 
    FROM Laboratory 
    WHERE APTT IS NOT NULL 
    ORDER BY APTT DESC 
    LIMIT 1
) * 1.5  -- Assuming abnormal APTT is > 1.5x the normal upper limit, using max APTT as proxy for normal upper limit
  AND e.Thrombosis = 'No';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM Examination e
JOIN Laboratory l ON e.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.APTT > (
    SELECT MAX(APTT) * 1.5
    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE APTT IS NOT NULL
)
  AND e.Thrombosis = 'No';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Examination e
JOIN Laboratory l ON e.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.APTT > (SELECT AVG(APTT) FROM Laboratory) 
  AND e.Thrombosis = 'No';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM Examination e
JOIN Laboratory l ON e.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.APTT > (
    SELECT APTT 
    FROM Laboratory 
    WHERE APTT IS NOT NULL 
    ORDER BY APTT DESC 
    LIMIT 1
) * 1.5  -- Assuming abnormal APTT is > 1.5x the normal upper limit, using max APTT as proxy for normal upper limit
  AND e.Thrombosis = 'No';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT e.ID
    FROM Examination e
    JOIN Laboratory l ON e.ID = l.ID
    WHERE l.APTT > (SELECT AVG(APTT) FROM Laboratory)
      AND e.Thrombosis = 'No'
);

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Examination e
JOIN Laboratory l ON e.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.APTT > (SELECT AVG(APTT) FROM Laboratory) 
  AND e.Thrombosis = 'No';
